title: chore(deps): update webdriverio monorepo
body:
This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Type | Update | Change |
|---|---|---|---|
| [@wdio/cli](https://togithub.com/webdriverio/webdriverio) | devDependencies | minor | [`5.15.6` -> `5.16.9`](https://renovatebot.com/diffs/npm/@wdio%2fcli/5.15.6/5.16.9) |
| [@wdio/jasmine-framework](https://togithub.com/webdriverio/webdriverio) | devDependencies | minor | [`5.15.1` -> `5.16.5`](https://renovatebot.com/diffs/npm/@wdio%2fjasmine-framework/5.15.1/5.16.5) |
| [@wdio/local-runner](https://togithub.com/webdriverio/webdriverio) | devDependencies | minor | [`5.15.6` -> `5.16.9`](https://renovatebot.com/diffs/npm/@wdio%2flocal-runner/5.15.6/5.16.9) |
| [@wdio/sauce-service](https://togithub.com/webdriverio/webdriverio) | devDependencies | minor | [`5.14.0` -> `5.16.5`](https://renovatebot.com/diffs/npm/@wdio%2fsauce-service/5.14.0/5.16.5) |
| [@wdio/selenium-standalone-service](https://togithub.com/webdriverio/webdriverio) | devDependencies | minor | [`5.15.0` -> `5.16.5`](https://renovatebot.com/diffs/npm/@wdio%2fselenium-standalone-service/5.15.0/5.16.5) |
| [@wdio/spec-reporter](https://togithub.com/webdriverio/webdriverio) | devDependencies | minor | [`5.15.2` -> `5.16.5`](https://renovatebot.com/diffs/npm/@wdio%2fspec-reporter/5.15.2/5.16.5) |
| [@wdio/static-server-service](https://togithub.com/webdriverio/webdriverio) | devDependencies | minor | [`5.14.4` -> `5.16.5`](https://renovatebot.com/diffs/npm/@wdio%2fstatic-server-service/5.14.4/5.16.5) |

---
